title: Did Apple (Finally) Get AI Right At WWDC?, Anthropic’s Worry, Microsoft vs. OpenAI
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss Apple's WWDC announcements on integrating AI into operating systems, Anthropic's claims about AI self-improvement capabilities, and competitive tensions between Microsoft and OpenAI. They examine questions about whether Anthropic can maintain ethical practices as a public company amid market pressures.
